'''thaluhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyelid|xyelid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyelid|xyelid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thaluhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thælihith|thælihith]] || [[word:thælihij|thælihij]] || [[word:thælihish|thælihish]] || [[word:thælihi|thælihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thaluluhuth|thaluluhuth]] || [[word:thaluluhuj|thaluluhuj]] || [[word:thaluluhush|thaluluhush]] || [[word:thaluluhu|thaluluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaluhuth|thaluhuth]] || [[word:thaluhuj|thaluhuj]] || [[word:thaluhush|thaluhush]] || [[word:thaluhu|thaluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalufhuth|thalufhuth]] || [[word:thalufhuj|thalufhuj]] || [[word:thalufhush|thalufhush]] || [[word:thalufhuf|thalufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thaluhuthu|thaluhuthu]] || [[word:thaluhuju|thaluhuju]] || [[word:thaluhushu|thaluhushu]] || [[word:thaluhuku|thaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thaluhuth|thaluhuth]] || [[word:thaluhuj|thaluhuj]] || [[word:thaluhush|thaluhush]] || [[word:thaluhu|thaluhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thaluhuthul|thaluhuthul]] || [[word:thaluhujul|thaluhujul]] || [[word:thaluhushul|thaluhushul]] || [[word:thaluhukul|thaluhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thaluhuthuthu|thaluhuthuthu]] || [[word:thaluhujuju|thaluhujuju]] || [[word:thaluhushushu|thaluhushushu]] || [[word:thaluhuku|thaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thaluhuthun|thaluhuthun]] || [[word:thaluhujun|thaluhujun]] || [[word:thaluhushun|thaluhushun]] || [[word:thaluhukun|thaluhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thaluhuthuoro|thaluhuthuoro]] || [[word:thaluhujuoro|thaluhujuoro]] || [[word:thaluhushuoro|thaluhushuoro]] || [[word:thaluhukuoro|thaluhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
